description: CompositionPurple round neck top made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print with stone embellishments on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironIt's all about looking glamourous in this stylish purple top from jealous 21. Team this with jeans, skirts or shorts for that cool look filled with attitude.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
